CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(mfg_Last_Forecast_Date__c), TODAY(), mfg_Last_Forecast_Date__c ) + IF( ISBLANK(mfg_Lead_Time_Days__c), 0, mfg_Lead_Time_Days__c )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The planned date for the next demand forecasting review for this inventory.
CustomField.label: Next Forecast Date
